_comment: NPC: Teng Li (藤立). Canon ID: N84. Per user directive: every miscellaneous NPC from RI must be accounted for. Prime Directive: Reality is objective; cultivation changes understanding, not existence. Every being described here exists independently of the player's perception.
name: Teng Li
note: Teng family young master; early antagonist Wang Lin defeats

dao_heart.note: 0-100. A cracked Dao heart blocks breakthrough regardless of Qi. Per canon: Wang Lin's Dao heart is famously tested at every major realm.

initiation_lines: Foundation Establishment. Something you will never achieve, standing there gaping like a fish.
The Teng family does not speak to peasants. But since you are here — make yourself useful or leave.
My cousin speaks softly to everyone. I prefer honesty. You are weak. Accept it.
There is a village nearby where the mortals think they can hide their grain from us. Amusing, isn't it?

sect_tasks.description: Teng Li smirks: 'I am refining my Foundation Establishment. Bring me coal for the forge and iron for talismans. Do it quickly.'
Teng Li laughs cruelly: 'Those villages think they can resist. Bring me their 'protection payment' — emeralds and gold. Show them what the Teng family means.'
